events.headline: Marc Marquez dominates German MotoGP to close in on championship lead

members.title: Marc Marquez dominates German MotoGP to close in on championship lead
members.snippet: Reigning champion won his 10th German Grand Prix and moves to within 18 points of the riders' championship lead.

events.headline: Ukraine’s Zelenskyy announces cabinet reshuffle, replaces PM Svyrydenko

members.title: Ukraine’s Zelenskyy announces cabinet reshuffle, replaces PM Svyrydenko
members.snippet: Yulia Svyrydenko to step down amid government shake-up aimed at prioritising foreign policy and security goals.
